subtitle.description: Brand Studio page subtitle describing what users can create.

poweredByAlt.description: Alt text for the 'Powered by Namefi' badge image.

logo.description: Tab label for the logo generator.

poster.description: Tab label for the poster generator.

animation.description: Tab label for the animation generator.

title.description: Hint title shown when a logo must be generated before a derivative.

posterDescription.description: Explains a generated logo is required before creating a poster.

animationDescription.description: Explains a generated logo is required before creating an animation.

credits.description: Label for the AI credits usage card.

usedThisMonth.description: Shows how many AI credits are used this month. {current} and {max} are numbers.

limitReached.description: Badge shown when the monthly AI credit limit is reached.

creditsLeft.description: Badge showing remaining AI credits. {count} is a number, with plural forms.

refreshAria.description: Accessible label for the credit refresh time info button.

refreshAt.description: Tooltip text showing when credits refresh. {time} is a formatted date/time.

refreshMonthly.description: Fallback tooltip text stating credits refresh monthly.

balanceCheckError.description: Toast title when the AI credit balance cannot be checked.

balanceCheckErrorDescription.description: Toast body when the AI credit balance cannot be verified.

checkingBalance.description: Status text shown while the AI credit balance is loading.

willCheckBalance.description: Status text stating the balance will be checked before generation.

creditAmount.description: Formats a credit cost amount. {count} is a number, with plural forms.

costInsufficient.description: Warning that a generation needs more credits than remaining. {cost} and {remaining} are formatted credit amounts.

costPreview.description: Preview of a generation's credit cost and remaining balance. {cost} and {remaining} are formatted credit amounts.

fixedLabel.description: Placeholder/label for the domain input when no domain is fixed.

logoPlaceholder.description: Placeholder for the brand domain field in the logo generator.

brandPlaceholder.description: Placeholder for the required brand domain field in poster/animation generators.

searchBrands.description: Search placeholder when only brand domains may be selected.

searchOrEnter.description: Search placeholder when a domain may be searched or typed.

emptyStudioLogos.description: Empty-state message when no Studio logo domains are found.

emptyMatching.description: Empty-state message when no matching domains are found.

label.description: Label for the optional brand description textarea.

placeholder.description: Placeholder for the brand description textarea.

gridTitle.description: Heading above the grid of generated logos.

chooseType.description: Section label for choosing a logo type.

chooseStyle.description: Section label for choosing a logo style.

chooseTldTreatment.description: Section label for choosing a TLD treatment.

chooseModel.description: Section label for choosing an image model.

type.description: Control chip label for logo type.

style.description: Control chip label for logo style.

tld.description: Control chip label for TLD treatment.

model.description: Control chip label for the image model.

brandVision.description: Control chip label opening the brand description panel.

advanced.description: Toggle label revealing advanced logo controls.

createPoster.description: Action to create a poster from a logo.

gridTitle.description: Heading above the grid of generated posters.

usingBrand.description: Shows which brand domain a poster uses. {domain} is the domain name.

backToLogos.description: Button returning from the poster flow to the logo tab.

chooseLogo.description: Section label for choosing a logo to base a poster on.

chooseModel.description: Section label for choosing an image model.

chooseCollateral.description: Section label for choosing a collateral type.

selectCollateral.description: Placeholder for the collateral type select.

useLogo.description: Control chip label for selecting a logo.

selected.description: Badge shown on the Use Logo chip when a logo is selected.

description.description: Control chip label opening the description panel.

model.description: Control chip label for the image model.

collateral.description: Control chip label for the collateral type.

advanced.description: Toggle label revealing advanced poster controls.

letAiChoose.description: Collateral option: let the AI choose the collateral type.

gridTitle.description: Heading above the grid of generated animations.

usingBrand.description: Shows which brand domain an animation uses. {domain} is the domain name.

backToLogos.description: Button returning from the animation flow to the logo tab.

chooseMode.description: Section label for choosing an animation mode.

chooseLogo.description: Section label for choosing a logo to animate.

chooseOpening.description: Section label for choosing an opening style.

chooseMotion.description: Section label for choosing a motion direction.

chooseIntensity.description: Section label for choosing motion intensity.

chooseModel.description: Section label for choosing an animation model.

selectOpening.description: Placeholder for the opening style select.

selectMotion.description: Placeholder for the motion preset select.

selectIntensity.description: Placeholder for the motion intensity select.

useLogoAria.description: Accessible label for a logo selection card. {domain} is the domain name.

mode.description: Control chip label for the animation mode.

useLogo.description: Control chip label for selecting a logo.

selected.description: Badge shown on the Use Logo chip when a logo is selected.

description.description: Control chip label opening the description panel.

opening.description: Control chip label for the opening style.

motion.description: Control chip label for the motion direction.

intensity.description: Control chip label for the motion intensity.

model.description: Control chip label for the animation model.

openingRequired.description: Validation error when an opening is required for cinematic animation.

chooseCinematicModel.description: Validation error prompting selection of a cinematic model.

chooseCinematicMotion.description: Validation error prompting selection of a cinematic motion preset.

chooseSeedanceModel.description: Validation error prompting selection of a Seedance model.

intensityRequired.description: Validation error when intensity is required for looped animation.

chooseLoopedModel.description: Validation error prompting selection of a looped model.

chooseLoopedMotion.description: Validation error prompting selection of a looped motion preset.

select.description: Placeholder for the image model select.

generate.description: Submit button text to generate an asset.

animate.description: Submit button text to generate an animation.

selectBrand.description: Submit button text prompting brand selection when none is chosen.

yours.description: Tab label for the user's own generations.

brands.description: Trigger label for the brand filter when none selected.

brandsSelected.description: Brand filter trigger showing count of selected brands. {count} is a number.

searchBrand.description: Search placeholder in the brand filter.

noBrands.description: Empty-state message when no brands match the filter.

emptyYours.description: Empty-state message when the user has no generations yet.

openAria.description: Accessible label to open a generation. {domain} is the domain name.

openFeaturedAria.description: Accessible label to open a featured generation. {domain} is the domain name.

viewAria.description: Accessible label to view a generation by index. {index} is a number.

animationPreviewAria.description: Accessible label for an animation preview video. {domain} is the domain name.

previewUnavailable.description: Placeholder text when a gallery item preview is unavailable.

basedOnLogo.description: Badge marking a generation derived from a logo.

basedOn.description: Label preceding the source logo thumbnail.

referencedLogoAlt.description: Alt text for the referenced source logo thumbnail.

logo.description: Type label for a logo generation tile.

poster.description: Type label for a poster generation tile.

animation.description: Type label for an animation generation tile.

generatingLogo.description: Overline label on a pending logo tile.

generatingPoster.description: Overline label on a pending poster tile.

preparingAnimation.description: Overline label on a pending animation tile.

gathering.description: Playful progress message at the start of a generation.

sketching.description: Playful progress message early in a generation.

blending.description: Playful progress message during a generation.

character.description: Playful progress message during a generation.

lighting.description: Playful progress message during a generation.

polishing.description: Playful progress message late in a generation.

framing.description: Playful progress message near the end of a generation.

almost.description: Playful progress message just before completion.

genericError.description: Generic message shown when a generation fails.

stillRunning.description: Message shown while a generation is still processing.

queued.description: Message shown while a generation is queued.

copy.description: Button to copy a generation link (compact).

copyLink.description: Button to copy a generation link.

tweet.description: Button to share a generation on X/Twitter.

download.description: Button to download a generation asset.

title.description: Confirmation dialog title for deleting a generation.

titleSingle.description: Confirmation dialog title for deleting the current generation.

descriptionLogo.description: Delete confirmation body for a logo. {domain} is the domain name.

descriptionPoster.description: Delete confirmation body for a poster. {domain} is the domain name.

descriptionAnimation.description: Delete confirmation body for an animation. {domain} is the domain name.

deleting.description: Button text while a delete is in progress.

unableTitle.description: Toast title when sharing is not possible.

unableMissingLink.description: Toast body when no shareable link exists for a generation.

unableMissingLinkOrDomain.description: Toast body when no shareable link or domain exists for a generation.

previewUnavailable.description: Placeholder text when an image grid item preview is unavailable.

backToStudio.description: Button returning to the Brand Studio from the details page.

headingLogo.description: Details page heading for a logo. {brand} is the brand name.

headingPoster.description: Details page heading for a poster. {brand} is the brand name.

headingAnimation.description: Details page heading for an animation. {brand} is the brand name.

notFoundTitle.description: Title shown when a generation cannot be found.

notFoundDescription.description: Body shown when a generation cannot be found.

assetUnavailable.description: Message shown when the generated asset is not yet available.

sectionTitle.description: Heading for the generation details card.

createdUnknown.description: Fallback text when the creation date is unknown.

collateralUnknown.description: Fallback text when the collateral type is unknown.

logoProperties.description: Heading for the logo properties card.

sourceLogo.description: Heading for the source logo card.

sourceLogoAlt.description: Alt text for the source logo image.

viewLogoDetails.description: Button to open the source logo's details page.

sourcePreviewUnavailable.description: Message when the source logo preview is unavailable.

sourceLoadFailed.description: Message when the source logo details fail to load.

sourceNotFound.description: Message when no source logo reference is found.

animationSheet.description: Heading for the animation sheet card.

animationSheetAlt.description: Alt text for the generated animation sheet. {domain} is the domain name.

openSheetAria.description: Accessible label to open the animation sheet preview.

sheetDialogTitle.description: Title of the animation sheet preview dialog.

sheetDialogDescription.description: Description of the animation sheet preview dialog.

shareTwitterTitle.description: Tooltip/title for the Twitter share button.

copyLinkTitle.description: Tooltip/title for the copy link button.

linkCopied.description: Toast title when the link is copied.

linkCopiedDescription.description: Toast body after the link is copied.

linkCopyFailed.description: Toast title when copying the link fails.

linkCopyFailedDescription.description: Toast body when copying the link fails.

animationLabelAria.description: Accessible label for the animation video. {mode} is the mode, {domain} is the domain name.

imageAlt.description: Alt text for a generated image. {type} is the generation type, {domain} is the domain name.
